query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract composition dominated by overlapping angular planes in saturated orange, yellow, and pale blue hues. Diagonal translucent sheets intersect across the frame, creating layered geometric forms. Fine parallel scanlines run vertically throughout the entire image, and moiré interference patterns ripple across the curved and flat color fields. A dark irregular contour line snakes between two color zones. The image has a low-resolution, screen-captured quality with visible rasterization and digital banding in gradient areas.
